arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's price tag has reportedly been revealed amidst speculation that Manchester United are open to offers for the forward in order to help Amorim strengthen.

arts.sum: Diego León has been the talk of the Manchester United rumour mill over the past 24 hours as claims came from South America of the Premier League being seriously interested in signing the 17-year-old. arts.ttl: Every word from Ruben Amorim press Viktoria Plzen press conference 11 November
arts.sum: To go [to] the Champions League is an important point to win the Premier League, that is really clear. Our goal is to win our Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'secure deal' for wonderkid who 'will join in 2025'
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly put a deal in place for Cerro Porteno's Diego Leon, with the 17-year-old set to join the Red Devils next summer.

arts.ttl: Agent Speaks Out as Conte Eyes Man Utd Reunion at Napoli
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly not planning to sell striker Joshua Zirkzee to Napoli in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists his future is on the line as much as his Man United players' if results do not improve
arts.sum: Asked on Wednesday night if he needs to sell to buy in January, Amorim brought the focus back to recent results, saying: 'I really don't know, there's a lot at stake at this moment.'
